have eq1 : g' 0 = ‚ąĎ i, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x := by
      simp [g']
      <;> try { aesop }
      <;> try { tauto }
      <;> try { native_decide }
    rw [eq1]
    have h1 : |‚ąĎ i, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| ‚Č§ ‚ąĎ i, |(y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| := by
      apply Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs
    have h2 : ‚ąĎ i, |(y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| = ‚ąĎ i, |(y i - x i)| * |nth_partial i f x| := by
      congr
      funext i
      have h3 : |(y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| = |(y i - x i)| * |nth_partial i f x| := by
        rw [abs_mul]
      simp [h3]
    rw [h2]
    have h4 : ‚ąÄ i : Fin n, |(y i - x i)| ‚Č§ őĶ := by
      intro i
      have h5 : |x i - y i| ‚Č§ őĶ := hdiff i
      have h6 : |y i - x i| = |x i - y i| := by
        have h7 : y i - x i = -(x i - y i) := by ring
        rw [h7]
        rw [abs_neg]
      linarith [h5, h6]
    have h5 : ‚ąĎ i, |(y i - x i)| * |nth_partial i f x| ‚Č§ ‚ąĎ i, őĶ * |nth_partial i f x| := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro i hi
      have h6 : |(y i - x i)| ‚Č§ őĶ := h4 i
      have h7 : |(y i - x i)| * |nth_partial i f x| ‚Č§ őĶ * |nth_partial i f x| := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right
        linarith
        all_goals
          positivity
      linarith [h7]
    have h6 : ‚ąĎ i, őĶ * |nth_partial i f x| = őĶ * ‚ąĎ i, |nth_partial i f x| := by
      rw [Finset.mul_sum]
    linarith [h1, h5, h6]
  have h1 : |f x - f y| = |g 1 - g 0| := by
    simp [g]
